clean: iPhone is now the cheapest during the Diwali sale.
hinglish: Diwali sale me iPhone sabse sasta ho gaya hai.
label: festival_discount

clean: The price went up due to high demand and low stock.
hinglish: Demand zyada hone se aur stock kam hone se price badh gaya.
label: demand_spike

clean: The product quality is very good, totally worth the money.
hinglish: Product ki quality bahut achhi hai, paisa vasool.
label: review_sentiment

clean: I returned it but the refund has not arrived in 10 days.
hinglish: Maine return kiya par 10 din se refund nahi aaya.
label: complaint_policy

clean: This item is out of stock, suggest an alternative.
hinglish: Ye item out of stock hai, koi alternative batao.
label: catalog_substitution

clean: Happy Diwali to all our valued customers.
hinglish: Sabhi customers ko Diwali ki shubhkamnayein.
label: noise

clean: The delivery was on time and packaging was great.
hinglish: Delivery time pe aayi aur packaging badhiya thi.
label: review_sentiment

clean: Great Indian Festival offer gives 30 percent off.
hinglish: Great Indian Festival pe 30 percent ka offer hai.
label: festival_discount
